title: Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines environment versions (Beta)
body: Environment versions for Lakeflow Spark Declarative Pipelines are now in Beta. Configure an environment version on a pipeline to pin the Python language version and set of preinstalled libraries, decoupling your pipeline's Python runtime from Databricks Runtime upgrades. See [Configure environment versions for pipelines](/aws/en/ldp/developer/environment-versions).
